curation_notes: Patch commit 270d90e identified from git log as 'Patch Stored XSS in Backup module by escaping filenames'. Only 1 non-test source file changed (modules/Backup/Controllers/Backup.php). The fix adds esc() calls to HTML-encode the backup filename in the index() method's DataTables AJAX response and in the delete() method's success/error response messages. Locations derived directly from the patch diff. No sibling controllers exist in the Backup module. Vulnerability class xss confirmed from CWE-79 and the patch clearly adding output encoding via esc().
